pattern: Splitting on spaces and rejecting any word that shares a letter with the broken set counts the typeable words.
hints: Process the text one whitespace-separated word at a time.
A word is typeable only if none of its letters belong to the broken keys.
Put the broken letters in a set and count words whose letter set is disjoint from it.

edge_inputs.description: no broken letters means every word counts
repeated broken letter only breaks matching words
all 26 letters broken breaks all words

stress.description: many random short words with a random broken set
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = max(1, size)
    words = []
    for _ in range(n):
        wl = rng.randint(1, 6)
        words.append(''.join(chr(rng.randint(97, 122)) for _ in range(wl)))
    text = ' '.join(words)
    k = rng.randint(0, 10)
    broken = ''.join(sorted(set(chr(rng.randint(97, 122)) for _ in range(k))))
    return [text, broken]
